decision.reasoning_trace: Selected products based on high ratings, large number of reviews, and relevance to running shoes. ASICS Men's Gel-Noosa Tri 12 Running Shoes (prod_running_shoes_126) has a high rating of 4.7 and over 900 reviews, indicating a high level of customer satisfaction. Similarly, Brooks Mens Ghost 12 Running Shoe (prod_running_shoes_177), ASICS Men's Gel-Kayano 26 Running Shoes (prod_running_shoes_069), ASICS Men's Noosa Tri 13 Running Shoes (prod_running_shoes_158), and ASICS Men's Gel-Contend 6 Running Shoes (prod_running_shoes_099) also have high ratings and a large number of reviews, making them suitable options for running shoes.
